business_question: How many distinct customers made purchases through the Web channel in each quarter of 2001?
business_context: The web channel team needs quarterly active customer counts to evaluate campaign reach and seasonal engagement.

aggregation_logic.Distinct Web Customers per Quarter: COUNT(DISTINCT customer_sk) grouped by d_qoy for year 2001

chain_of_thought: Use web_sales to access web channel customer transactions.
Join to date_dim and filter to d_year = 2001.
Group by d_qoy (quarter of year) and apply COUNT DISTINCT on customer key.
Order by quarter to show seasonal customer engagement trend.
sql_answer:
SELECT
  d.d_qoy AS quarter,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ws.ws_bill_customer_sk) AS distinct_customers
FROM web_sales ws
JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY d.d_qoy
ORDER BY d.d_qoy;
